/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -pie -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,-z,noexecstack -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/macrosip_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/app/MacroSipApp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/app/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/models/Account.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/models/Contact.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/models/CallRecord.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/models/Settings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/sip/SipManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/sip/SipCall.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/sip/SipAccount.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/dialogs/AccountDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/dialogs/SettingsDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/dialogs/MessagesDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/dialogs/RingingDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/dialogs/TransferDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/dialogs/AddContactDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/dialogs/AAOptionsDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/dialogs/FeatureCodesDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/dialogs/ShortcutsDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/widgets/DialerWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/widgets/ContactsWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/widgets/CallsWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/widgets/ClosableTabWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/widgets/LevelsSlider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/utils/Crypto.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/utils/CsvFile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/utils/LangPack.cpp.o CMakeFiles/macrosip.dir/macrosip_autogen/3YJK5W5UP7/qrc_resources.cpp.o -o macrosip  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Multimedia.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Network.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.13
